steps.title: Spot the requirement: emphasize a similarity
steps.content: The task asks us to emphasize a similarity, which means we need a choice using similarity language, not contrast language.

steps.title: Match similarity language to a genuine shared quality
steps.content:
Choice C — Like herpetologist Helen Maria Lawson, biochemist Clara Winifred Ashcroft dedicated her scientific career to the study of living organisms. opens with “Like,” explicitly marking similarity, and identifies the shared focus: both dedicated careers to studying living organisms—herpetology studies living amphibians and reptiles; biochemistry studies living organisms' chemistry.

The contrast-word options highlight differences, while the remaining option discusses scientific fields without connecting the women's shared work.

That matches Choice C — Like herpetologist Helen Maria Lawson, biochemist Clara Winifred Ashcroft dedicated her scientific career to the study of living organisms..
